body:
## Rationale

Jocke Wallgren is the drummer for **Amon Amarth** (2013–present), one of the biggest and most consistent acts in melodic death/viking metal globally. Amon Amarth has a dedicated worldwide fanbase with high search intent around gear. Jocke is in `extendedBios.js` and has signature lick pages in queue.

**No article exists** in `albumArticles.js` for Jocke Wallgren — confirmed by search of all `slug:` entries.

Target queries: "jocke wallgren drum setup", "amon amarth drummer kit", "amon amarth drum gear", "twilight of the thunder god drums".

## Files to touch

**`packages/frontend/data/albumArticles.js`** — add article entry:

```js
{
  slug: 'jocke-wallgren-drum-setup',
  title: 'Jocke Wallgren\'s Drum Setup — Amon Amarth\'s Viking Metal Kit',
  metaTitle: 'Jocke Wallgren Drum Kit & Gear Setup — Amon Amarth | MetalForge',
  description: 'Complete gear breakdown for Jocke Wallgren of Amon Amarth. Drum kit, cymbals, pedals, sticks, and how his setup powers the viking metal sound.',
  drummer: 'Jocke Wallgren',
  drummerSlug: 'jocke-wallgren',
  band: 'Amon Amarth',
  genre: 'Melodic Death Metal',
  keywords: ['jocke wallgren drum setup', 'amon amarth drummer', 'jocke wallgren drum kit', 'amon amarth drum gear'],
  datePublished: '2026-06-19',
  dateModified: '2026-06-19',
}
```

## Quality gate

- ≥ 300 words article body
- ≥ 3 FAQ Q&A:
  - "What drum kit does Jocke Wallgren use?"
  - "What cymbals does Jocke Wallgren play?"
  - "How does Jocke Wallgren get the Amon Amarth drum sound?"
- ≥ 3 internal links: profile + /bands/amon-amarth (if exists) + gear category
- SSR Article schema via existing #1064 handler

## Estimated uplift

Amon Amarth consistently top-charting in melodic death/viking metal. "jocke wallgren drum setup" + "amon amarth drummer gear" target a dedicated gear-curious audience. Compounds with jocke-wallgren lick pages (in queue).

## Verify

1. `/articles/jocke-wallgren-drum-setup` returns 200 with SSR title "Jocke Wallgren"
2. Article body ≥ 300 words, 3+ internal links, FAQ 3+ Q&A
3. Article in sitemap.xml
4. No existing `/articles/jocke-wallgren*` route duplicated

## Done

`jocke-wallgren-drum-setup` article live with full gear specs, FAQ, and internal links.
title: SEO: Jocke Wallgren drum setup article — Amon Amarth, viking metal, no existing article
